issues.description: Trigger should be 'Activated' with activation type 'Main' (not captured in current DSL structure)
Condition checks Leader type incorrectly. Should use 'LeaderHasType' with value 'Blackbeard Pirates', not 'HasCardOnBoard'
Missing action: trash this Character. Current DSL only includes TrashFromHand and DrawCard. Missing PowerBoost action for opponent's Characters (−2 cost).

Missing second effect: 'give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −2 cost during this turn' requires PowerBoost action with target type 'OpponentCharacter', count 1, power -2, and duration 'DuringYourTurn'
TrashFromHand should be conditional (optional 'You may'). Current DSL doesn't reflect optional cost.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Activate: Main] You may trash 1 card from your hand and trash this Character: If your Leader has the {Blackbeard Pirates} type, draw 1 card. Then, give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −2 cost during this turn.
